sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SRET ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns NASDAQ:SRET
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of the Global X SuperDividend REIT ETF (SRET), detailing its dividend yield, asset allocation, performance, and key characteristics. SRET invests in 30 high-dividend REITs globally and has an expense ratio of 0.58%. The fund aims to provide income and has seen recent growth in NAV and dividends.

feed.title: JPMorgan will fight CLARITY Act in current form, Jamie Dimon says (JPM:NYSE)
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon stated the company will oppose the CLARITY Act's stablecoin legislation in its current form. Dimon expressed confidence that JPMorgan is "not worried" about the proposed legislation, signaling the bank's intent to actively engage against it. This indicates a potential conflict between JPMorgan and policymakers regarding stablecoin regulation.

feed.title: Asana (NYSE:ASAN) Given New $13.00 Price Target at KeyCorp
feed.summary: KeyCorp adjusted its price target for Asana (NYSE:ASAN) to $13.00 from $15.00 while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment comes after Asana reported better-than-expected Q1 earnings, with $0.10 EPS and $205.1 million in revenue, leading to a 13.9% stock increase. Despite positive guidance and strategic acquisitions, analyst sentiment remains mixed, and other firms have also cut their price targets.

feed.title: Still ringing a bell: F5 marks its 30th year in business
feed.summary: F5, a Seattle-based internet traffic-management company, celebrated its 30th anniversary by ringing the opening bell on Nasdaq. The company has successfully adapted its business from early internet services to data centers, cloud, and artificial intelligence, outliving many of its original dot-com era customers. F5 projects significant growth through 2029, driven largely by new AI opportunities.

feed.title: Prediction: Royal Caribbean Still Has Room to Run Despite Rally
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) has a strong operating story despite recent stock choppiness, with adjusted EPS beating consensus and management guiding for significant growth through 2027. Despite headwinds like a potential permit denial for Perfect Day Mexico and elevated fuel costs, the company's valuation at 15x forward earnings suggests upside. 24/7 Wall St. predicts a target price of $319, indicating a 24.56% upside from its recent close.

feed.title: Blackstone to sell Seattle office building for ~54% below purchase price - report (BX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Blackstone is reportedly selling the U.S. Bank Center in Seattle to Spear Street Capital for approximately $280 million. This sale price is about 54% below the $612 million Blackstone paid for the building in 2019. The deal highlights a significant markdown in a major real estate transaction for the investment firm.

feed.title: Advisor moves: Wells Fargo welcomes back $550M advisor duo from Ameriprise
feed.summary: Wells Fargo Advisors has welcomed back Thomas Hughes and Bill Steele, a financial advisor duo managing over $550 million in client assets, from Ameriprise Financial. Meanwhile, Raymond James' employee channel added veteran advisor Thomas Conway from D.A. Davidson & Co., who managed $182 million, and Ballast Rock Private Wealth recruited Jake Fetchen as a wealth advisor. These moves highlight continued talent shifts within the financial advisory industry, with Wells Fargo demonstrating strong recruiting momentum across its platforms.

feed.title: Will CEO Linda Rendle’s Health-Driven Exit Reshape Clorox’s (CLX) Long-Term Strategic Narrative?
feed.summary: The Clorox Company's CEO, Linda Rendle, is stepping down for health reasons, prompting a comprehensive CEO search. This leadership transition could impact Clorox's long-term operational and portfolio plans, especially as the company recently cut its FY2026 earnings guidance. The article suggests investors will now focus on how new leadership will influence execution of cost savings, ERP benefits, and innovation, in light of competitive discounting and private label pressure.

feed.title: Walmart Inc Stock (WMT) Moved Down by 3.20% on May 29: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Walmart Inc (WMT) stock declined by 3.20% on May 29, 2026, primarily due to rising concerns over consumer spending, macroeconomic indicators showing reduced consumer confidence, and the company's own warnings about the impact of escalating gas prices on low-income customers. Additionally, the stock faces pressure from valuation concerns, with analyses suggesting it might be overvalued, and reduced institutional holdings coupled with insider selling. Technical indicators like MACD also suggest a sell signal, while RSI and Williams %R point to neutral and oversold conditions, respectively.

feed.title: VRTX: Renal franchise set to rival CF as new therapies and launches drive next phase of growth
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) is expanding its franchises beyond Cystic Fibrosis (CF) into pain, hematology, and renal therapies, showing strong pipeline progress and launches. While ALYFTREK remains the CF standard and JOURNAVX sees rapid growth in pain management, the renal franchise is poised for significant impact with several late-stage programs. This strategic expansion suggests the renal segment could soon rival the success of its CF therapies.

feed.title: Palantir Technologies Inc Stock (PLTR) Moved Up by 8.75% on May 29: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR) saw its stock rise by 8.75% on May 29, driven by strong Q1 2026 financial results, including raised full-year revenue guidance and impressive margins. The company's performance was bolstered by successful government contracts, commercial partnerships—especially with Dell Technologies—and positive analyst sentiment. Despite concerns about its valuation and insider selling, Palantir's strategic advancements and foundational role in AI infrastructure contributed to investor confidence.

feed.title: Paycom Software Inc. stock (US70432V1026): shares steady as investors digest latest earnings and val
authors: ad-hoc-news.de editorial team - specialized in equity coverage.
feed.summary: Paycom Software Inc. (PAYC) shares have remained steady on the NYSE as investors assess the company's first-quarter 2026 results and forward valuation multiples. The company reported double-digit year-on-year revenue growth and healthy operating margins, reflecting continued demand for its cloud-based human capital management services. Investors are balancing solid profitability and recurring revenue with questions about growth normalization in the broader software sector and macroeconomic considerations.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Jeffrey S Lorberbaum Unloads $527K Of Mohawk Industries Stock
feed.summary: Jeffrey S Lorberbaum, CEO of Mohawk Industries (NYSE: MHK), sold 5,000 shares worth $527,650 on May 28, according to an SEC filing. Despite this insider selling, Mohawk Industries shares were up 0.11% the next day. The article also provides a financial overview of Mohawk Industries, highlighting its revenue growth, low debt-to-equity ratio, above-average market capitalization, and favorable valuation metrics.

feed.title: SVP & Chief Accounting Officer Of Expedia Group Makes $208K Sale
feed.summary: Lance Soliday, SVP & Chief Accounting Officer at Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE), sold 940 shares worth $208,547 on May 28. This insider sale comes as Expedia Group's shares were down by 1.09%, trading at $228.34, with the company demonstrating strong revenue growth but facing challenges in debt management and a declining EPS. The article provides a financial overview of Expedia Group, including its profitability metrics and valuation analysis, and explains the significance of insider transactions for investors.

feed.title: Director Of Stryker Sold $96.79M In Stock
feed.summary: Ronda E Stryker, a director at Stryker (NYSE: SYK), sold 310,000 shares of the company's stock for a total of $96.79 million on May 28, 2026. This insider transaction was disclosed in an SEC Form 4 filing. The article also provides a detailed look at Stryker's financial performance, including revenue growth, profitability metrics, debt management, and market valuation.

feed.title: Smart Sand Board Member Trades $246K In Company Stock
feed.summary: Smart Sand (NASDAQ: SND) board member Sharon Spurlin sold 50,000 shares of company stock for a total of $246,500, as disclosed in a recent SEC filing. Despite this insider sale, Smart Sand reported strong Q1 2026 revenue growth of 42.03% and maintains a prudent debt-to-equity ratio of 0.17. While insider transactions offer some insight, the article emphasizes that they should be considered alongside other financial metrics for investment decisions.

feed.title: Packaging Corp of America Chairman & CEO Sold $2.01M In Company Stock
feed.summary: Mark Kowalzan, Chairman and CEO of Packaging Corp of America (NYSE: PKG), sold 9,266 shares of company stock for a total transaction value of $2,011,426, according to an SEC filing on May 28. While the company exhibits positive revenue growth and prudent debt management, its stock is currently perceived as overvalued based on various metrics like P/E, P/S, and EV/EBITDA ratios. Insider transactions are crucial for investors as they offer insights into a company's financial health and future prospects.

feed.title: Truist Financial Downgrades Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) to Hold
feed.summary: Truist Financial downgraded Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) from "buy" to "hold" and lowered its price target to $31, citing limited upside from the current share price. Wall Street's sentiment on CZR is mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and a consensus price target of $32.73, following recent quarterly earnings that missed profit expectations and elevated leverage. The company's stock traded down by $0.10 on Friday, and institutional investors have recently adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: Sempra should spin off its Oncor unit, activist investor Voss says - report (SRE:NYSE)
feed.summary: Activist investor Voss Capital, holding less than 1% of Sempra shares, is urging Sempra to spin off its Texas electric unit, Oncor Electric Delivery Company. Voss believes that an independent Oncor would be beneficial.

feed.title: IBM jumps 9.2% as investors focus on expanded quantum investment and CHIPS-backed foundry plans
feed.summary: IBM's stock surged 9.2% due to renewed investor excitement over its quantum strategy, including a new multi-year investment plan and a CHIPS-supported quantum chip foundry structure. The company announced a letter of intent for a proposed $1 billion CHIPS incentive for a new IBM-backed quantum foundry called Anderon, alongside a separate $10 billion quantum investment program. This re-rating is driven by a "two-track" narrative of quantum hardware/foundry positioning and enterprise software/security initiatives.

feed.title: Sensata downgraded to Equal Weight after recent share price gains: Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays downgraded Sensata Technologies (ST) to Equal Weight from Overweight, citing the company's significant share price rally of nearly 50% year-to-date. Sensata is a Massachusetts-based producer of sensors for various industries.

feed.title: MarketAxess Holdings stock hits 52-week low at $130.07
feed.summary: MarketAxess Holdings Inc. (MKTX) stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $130.07, representing a 39.66% decline over the past year. Despite this downturn and an oversold RSI, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, trading at a P/E of 15.59 and PEG of 0.32. This financial technology company recently reported strong Q1 2026 results, exceeding revenue and EPS forecasts.

feed.title: Reliance Steel stock hits all-time high at 381.3 USD
feed.summary: Reliance Steel & Aluminum Co. (RS) has reached an all-time high stock price of 381.3 USD, reflecting a significant upward trend with gains of 29.44% over the past year. This growth is supported by strong Q1 2026 earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. Despite this, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may be overvalued relative to its Fair Value.

feed.title: Wells Fargo CEO touts 'great shape' of consumers
feed.summary: Wells Fargo CEO Charlie Scharf discussed the bank's growth and strategy following the lifting of its $2 trillion asset cap. He also commented on the state of the consumer and the Federal Reserve. The interview took place on "Mornings with Maria."

feed.title: Democratic senator wants TikTok US JV, Oracle to answer questions on platform safeguards
feed.summary: Senator Ed Markey has requested that TikTok's U.S. joint venture and Oracle provide information regarding the security of American user data and efforts to prevent foreign manipulation of TikTok's content recommendation algorithm. This comes after TikTok's Chinese owner, ByteDance, finalized a deal to establish a majority American-owned joint venture to secure U.S. data and avoid a ban on the app. Oracle is one of the three managing investors in TikTok USDS JV, which will retrain, test, and update TikTok's algorithm using U.S. user data, secured in Oracle's U.S. cloud.

feed.title: ServiceNow Stock Is Trending Higher After CMO Joins OpenAI
feed.summary: ServiceNow shares are trending higher after its Chief Marketing Officer, Colin Fleming, announced he is leaving the company to join OpenAI's business division as its CMO. Fleming's departure and move to OpenAI has drawn investor attention, with ServiceNow's stock showing improved momentum despite a long-term repair job indicated by its trading below the 200-day SMA. The article details ServiceNow's technical analysis, including support and resistance levels, and highlights the stock's recent price action.

feed.title: Q1 Earnings Roundup: Textron (NYSE:TXT) And The Rest Of The Aerospace Segment
feed.summary: The article provides a Q1 earnings roundup for the aerospace segment, highlighting Textron (NYSE:TXT) and its peers. Textron reported strong revenue and EPS growth, while Rocket Lab (NASDAQ:RKLB) showed the fastest revenue growth. AerSale (NASDAQ:ASLE) had the weakest performance against analyst estimates, with ATI (NYSE:ATI) and AAR (NYSE:AIR) also reporting their Q1 results.

feed.title: Soligenix, Inc. Files SEC Form 8-K for May 28, 2026 – Company Information and Legal Exhibits
feed.summary: Soligenix, Inc. filed an 8-K with the SEC announcing an increase in its At Market Issuance Sales Agreement with Rodman & Renshaw LLC by $2,956,000, bringing the total to $6,406,000. This move, approved by the Board of Directors, aims to raise capital but also introduces potential dilution risk for shareholders. The company has authorization for its President, CEO, or CFO to execute the necessary filings and list new shares on the Nasdaq Capital Market, with a pricing committee determining per-share offering prices.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Launches New DNA and RNA Analysis System
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has introduced the Invitrogen E-Gel Power Snap Lite Electrophoresis System, a new compact platform designed to simplify routine DNA and RNA verification. This integrated system combines gel electrophoresis and imaging, eliminating the need for manual gel casting and buffer preparation. It aims to reduce hands-on time and improve consistency for routine and low-throughput laboratory workflows.

feed.title: Chipotle sets June 2 opening in West Jacksonville
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is set to open its 15th Jacksonville location on June 2 at 7952 Normandy Blvd. in West Jacksonville. This new restaurant will feature a "Chipotlane" drive-thru for digital order pickups and will operate daily from 10:45 a.m. to 10 p.m., creating approximately 30 new jobs.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Launches New DNA and RNA Analysis System
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has released the Invitrogen E-Gel Power Snap Lite Electrophoresis System, a compact and integrated solution for routine nucleic acid verification. This system streamlines DNA and RNA analysis by combining gel electrophoresis and imaging in one device, eliminating manual gel casting and buffer preparation. It's designed to reduce hands-on time and improve consistency for routine and low-throughput workflows, such as PCR verification and RNA quality assessment.

feed.title: Amcor stock (JE00BJ1F6598): Wells Fargo trims price target as U.S. legal probe keeps focus on NYSE-l
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has trimmed its price target for Amcor (JE00BJ1F6598) to $41 from $43, maintaining an Equal Weight rating. This adjustment comes as a U.S. legal firm, Girard Sharp LLP, has initiated an investigation into potential claims by investors who received Amcor stock in the 2025 Berry Global merger, adding both valuation and legal pressures on the Switzerland-based packaging group. The dual developments are keeping Amcor shares under close scrutiny by NYSE investors, despite the company's attractive dividend yield.

feed.title: Venezuela Must Cut Taxes to Attract Investment, Chevron CEO Says
feed.summary: Chevron CEO Mike Wirth stated that Venezuela needs to reduce taxes and royalties on oil production to attract new capital investment from the company next year. This call comes as Venezuela aims to rebuild investor trust and increase oil exports following eased US sanctions.

feed.title: UBS (AMUB) offers autocallable buffer notes linked to Freeport-McMoRan (FCX)
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering Phoenix Autocallable Buffer Notes with Memory Interest linked to Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FCX). These notes have a principal amount of $1,000, offer contingent interest payments of $15.80, and mature in approximately 12 months with a maturity date of June 3, 2027. The notes are automatically callable if FCX's closing price meets or exceeds the initial price, but if not called and the final price is below the downside threshold, investors may receive less than the principal amount.

feed.title: Is Danaher Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
feed.summary: Danaher Corporation (DHR) has significantly underperformed the S&P 500 Index, with its stock declining 25.6% from its 52-week high and 13.8% over the past three months, while the S&P 500 gained 10%. Despite beating Q1 adjusted EPS expectations, DHR's revenue fell short, and its shares have been trading below key moving averages. Wall Street analysts, however, maintain a "Strong Buy" rating with a potential upside of 34.3%.

feed.title: BlackRock Scales Back Equities After ‘Generational’ Earnings
feed.summary: BlackRock Inc. has reduced its overweight position in equities from 3% to 1% across its $220 billion model-portfolio business, despite US equities reaching record highs after a strong earnings season. The world's largest asset manager is rotating away from longer-dated US debt in favor of global fixed-income and liquid alternatives, reevaluating traditional portfolio hedges. While still confident in equities, BlackRock believes the positive indicators are already priced into the market, leading to a narrower path for outperformance.

feed.title: Exclusive: GM-LG battery company delays return of laid-off workers to Ohio plant
feed.summary: The Ultium Cells plant, jointly owned by General Motors and LG Energy Solution, has delayed the return of laid-off workers in Ohio until August due to weak demand for electric vehicles. Hundreds of employees were initially told to expect to return in June but received an internal announcement pushing the date back. The plant had previously laid off 850 workers temporarily and 480 permanently last fall, providing battery cells for GM's EVs.

feed.title: Church & Dwight acquires Miss Mouth’s Messy Eater brand for $325M
feed.summary: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. has acquired Miss Mouth's Messy Eater brand for approximately $325 million. The brand, known for its fast-acting, nontoxic stain removal products, generated around $80 million in net sales and $28 million in EBITDA for the 12 months ending December 31, 2025. This acquisition is expected to be neutral to Church & Dwight's 2026 EPS but accretive to cash earnings in 2027, leveraging the brand's strong e-commerce presence and appeal among Millennial and Gen Z parents.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Announces CELMoD Mezigdomide Reduces Risk of Disease Progression or Death by More than 50% vs. Standard of Care in Relapsed or Refractory Multiple Myeloma
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb announced positive Phase 3 results for its CELMoD mezigdomide, demonstrating a 52% reduction in the risk of disease progression or death in patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma. The MeziKd combination showed a median progression-free survival of 18 months and a consistent safety profile. These findings bolster the potential of CELMoD therapies as a new standard of care and will be shared with health authorities.

feed.title: Texas Department of Public Safety Accepts Delivery of Bell 407GXi; Bell and Texas DPS leadership gathered in Austin to celebrate this milestone
feed.summary: Bell Textron Inc. announced the delivery of a new Bell 407GXi helicopter to the Texas Department of Public Safety (DPS), expanding their air operations fleet. This delivery marks a continuation of a nearly 60-year relationship between Bell and Texas DPS, enhancing the department's ability to support law enforcement, emergencies, and public safety across the state. The Bell 407GXi, known for its advanced technology and mission versatility, joins other Bell models previously operated by Texas DPS.

feed.title: General Electric Co stock (US3696041033): GE Aerospace edges higher after new U.S. Air Force engine
feed.summary: General Electric Co (GE) shares traded modestly higher on the NYSE after GE Aerospace announced a new U.S. Air Force GE426 engine design contract, keeping the stock in focus for future defense and aviation programs. The contract involves the preliminary design review of the GE426 engine for future military applications, extending GE Aerospace's relationship with the U.S. Department of Defense. Trading near its 52-week high, the stock's performance reflects optimism about the company's aerospace-focused strategy and its role as a key defense engine supplier.

feed.title: CVS Caremark Expands GLP-1 Formulary Coverage
feed.summary: CVS Caremark announced it will reinstate Zepbound (tirzepatide) to its commercial formularies as a preferred option and remove the new-to-market block on Foundayo (orforglipron), effective October 1, 2026, and June 1, 2026, respectively. This move, stemming from negotiations with drug manufacturers, aims to expand GLP-1 access while managing costs and signals how PBMs might approach oral GLP-1 agents. The decision highlights ongoing affordability and access challenges for plan sponsors regarding weight-loss GLP-1s, with coverage often contingent on negotiated pricing concessions.

feed.title: See what symbol is on Alabama’s Coca-Cola America250 mini can
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is releasing limited-edition America250 mini cans and bottles in celebration of America's upcoming 250th birthday in 2026. Each state will have a unique design, with Alabama's can featuring an "AL" abbreviation and a football helmet, honoring its strong football tradition. These collectible cans, available at major retailers, also offer interactive experiences and prizes.

feed.title: [U.S. Equities] Dow Inc rises for second consecutive session, up 165 points; Nasdaq also hits new record high (as of morning, 29th)
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) saw its stock rise for the second consecutive session, gaining 165 points on the morning of the 29th. The Nasdaq also achieved a new record high. This positive movement indicates a strong performance for both Dow Inc. and the broader Nasdaq market.

feed.title: Oracle Corp Stock (ORCL) Moved Up by 6.39% on May 29: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Oracle's stock price increased by 6.39% due to a new multi-billion dollar cloud infrastructure deal with the US government for AI computing capacity. The company also raised its revenue guidance for fiscal year 2027, reflecting strong demand for its AI infrastructure and cloud offerings, and has received positive sentiment from financial analysts and increased institutional investor confidence. Despite these positives, Oracle faces risks including substantial net debt, lower profitability in its AI cloud operations, uncertainty in converting its RPO backlog, and significant restructuring costs from recent workforce reductions.

feed.title: Duke Energy Florida implements third rate reduction to lower residential customer bills by approximately 25% in 2026
feed.summary: Duke Energy Florida is implementing its third rate reduction of 2026, which will decrease residential customer bills by approximately $50, or 25%, for every 1,000 kilowatt-hours used, when compared to January levels. This reduction is attributed to the early removal of storm cost recovery charges, a seasonal decrease to help with higher energy use periods, and a "true up" reflecting the difference between collected and incurred storm costs. Additionally, the company highlights ongoing efforts to create further savings through efficiency improvements in natural gas plants, new solar energy sites, and the passing on of Inflation Reduction Act tax credits.

feed.title: Cisco's Biggest AI Bet Wasn't Made In 2025 — It Was Made In 2016
feed.summary: Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins revealed that the company's significant role in the current AI buildout stems from a silicon company acquisition made in 2016, long before AI gained mainstream attention. This strategic move provided Cisco with critical networking silicon, a key competitive advantage for connecting large AI clusters. Ironically, while Cisco aimed to shift towards software and recurring revenue, the AI boom has emphasized hardware, underscoring that many AI winners had laid foundational groundwork years in advance.

feed.title: Estonia clears Tesla FSD for roads, company says rollout to begin soon
feed.summary: Estonia's transport authority has approved Tesla's FSD (Full Self-Driving) driver-assistance system for use on its roads, recognizing a type approval initially granted in the Netherlands. Tesla announced on X that the rollout will begin soon. The authority clarified that FSD is a Level 2 driver assistance system, meaning the driver remains fully responsible and must be prepared to take control at all times.

feed.title: SLB and Vår Energi embark on digital quest to speed up oil & gas decision-making
feed.summary: SLB and Vår Energi are expanding their collaboration to accelerate oil and gas decision-making, aiming to cut the time from discovery to first oil by leveraging collaborative well planning and integrated field development planning. They plan to use the Delfi digital platform in a cloud-native environment to connect various stages of development, enabling concurrent work with shared data. This strategy is expected to reduce cycle times from months to days, improve consistency, and manage complex offshore assets more effectively.

feed.title: Chevron (NYSE: CVX) investors back board, reject ESG proposals
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation's stockholders voted to back the company's board of directors and executive compensation at their 2026 Annual Meeting, with high approval ratings for all 12 director nominees and the auditor ratification. Conversely, all environmental, social, and governance (ESG) related proposals, including those concerning an independent chair and human rights reports, were rejected with very low support. This outcome signifies strong investor confidence in Chevron's current leadership and operational strategy over increased ESG oversight.
